message:
feat(vef): verification framework hardening — evidence tracking, serde cleanup, and proof freshness

control_integration:
- Track scope mismatch, expiry, and invalidity flags separately during
  evidence evaluation — enables precise denial reasons instead of generic
  "insufficient evidence" messages
- Improved DenialReason Display formatting

verification_state:
- Remove cfg_attr(feature = "serde") guards — derive Serialize/Deserialize
  unconditionally since serde is always available in this crate
- Applies to RiskLevel, VerificationPolicy, ActionRecord, and related types

proof_verifier:
- Gate proof_expired() constructor with #[cfg(test)] — only used in tests
- Whitespace cleanup in freshness check logic

evidence_capsule:
- Extended capsule fields for richer evidence metadata

proof_generator:
- Enhanced proof generation with additional context fields

constraint_compiler:
- Constraint compilation refinements

verifier_economy:
- New economy module additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
